headline: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Is Up 11.1% After New AI Data Center And Edge Network Platforms
summary: In late May 2026, Broadcom and partners including Samsung, FuriosaAI, Applied Materials, LSEG, and telecom operators announced new Wi‑Fi 8, 50G PON, FWA, and AI accelerator platforms that tie Broadcom’s chips deeper into both AI data centers and next‑generation broadband networks. These moves highlight how Broadcom is trying to link its fast‑growing AI semiconductor franchise with “edge AI” in homes and enterprises, potentially widening the company’s role across the full path from cloud to...

headline: Marvell among the gainers in latest AI trade upswing
summary: Marvell Technology (MRVL) stock has rocketed higher by over 25% after Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang declared the custom chipmaker to be “the next trillion-dollar company" at Computex Taipei 2026. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson examine the latest headlines moving stocks in the AI trade landscape. This news comes as Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares surge by over 30% in response to the tech company beat past fiscal second quarter estimates on adjusted earnings and revenue.

content.title: Marvell among the gainers in latest AI trade upswing
content.description:
Marvell Technology (MRVL) stock has rocketed higher by over 25% after Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang declared the custom chipmaker to be “the next trillion-dollar company" at Computex Taipei 2026.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson examine the latest headlines moving stocks in the AI trade landscape.

This news comes as Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares surge by over 30% in response to the tech company beat past fiscal second quarter estimates on adjusted earnings and revenue.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson examine the latest headlines moving stocks in the AI trade landscape. This news comes as Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares surge by over 30% in response to the tech company beat past fiscal second quarter estimates on adjusted earnings and revenue.

headline: Broadcom Stock Is Getting a Double Boost From Google and Marvell
summary: Two stories were moving markets on Tuesday—Google parent  Alphabet  unveiled a plan to issue $80 billion of equity, and  Nvidia  CEO Jensen Huang said  Marvell Technology  could top a $1 trillion valuation.  Both events were giving  Broadcom  stock a boost.  Alphabet’s plan to raise tens of billions of dollars to help pay for its AI infrastructure drew a mixed response from the market, but bodes well for Broadcom.

Both events were giving  Broadcom  stock a boost.  Alphabet’s plan to raise tens of billions of dollars to help pay for its AI infrastructure drew a mixed response from the market, but bodes well for Broadcom.

headline: Broadcom Jumps 6% on Alphabet $80B AI Raise, Marvell Soars 18% on Jensen Huang’s $1T Endorsement
summary: Shares of Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) are up 6% in Tuesday’s premarket session, trading near $486 after closing Monday at $459.97. headline: Broadcom Advances as Alphabet’s $80 Billion AI Capital Raise Highlights Infrastructure Demand (AVGO)
summary: Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) shares climbed more than 6% in premarket trading on Tuesday after Alphabet announced plans to raise $80 billion in new equity capital to support a major expansion of its artificial intelligence infrastructure. The fundraising initiative reinforced investor confidence in companies positioned to benefit from the rapid growth of AI-related spending, including Broadcom, which maintains a deep strategic relationship with Google.

headline: Broadcom, Marvell, HPE, Alphabet, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: The rebound in software stocks appeared to be fizzling out as Wall Street pivoted back toward the chip and server makers that have helped power the market to all-time highs in recent months.  Investors were focused on  Hewlett Packard Enterprise  Google parent  Alphabet  plans to raise $80 billion, and Anthropic’s decision Monday to file for its initial public offering.  Oil prices, meanwhile, moved higher as Wall Street continued to weigh ongoing uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran peace negotiations and the future of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Only One Man Can Kill the AI Boom: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh

headline: Wall Street hangs around its records as the AI boom keeps growing
summary: The U.S. stock market is ticking toward more records Tuesday as winners of the artificial-intelligence boom keep driving higher.  Marvell Technology leaped 29.5% toward its best day in three years after Nvidia’s CEO, Jensen Huang, suggested at a conference in Taiwan that Marvell could be “the next trillion-dollar company.”  Hewlett Packard Enterprise's stock soared 16.5% after it reported a profit for the latest quarter that blew past analysts’ expectations.

content.title: Wall Street hangs around its records as the AI boom keeps growing
content.summary: The U.S. stock market is ticking toward more records Tuesday as winners of the artificial-intelligence boom keep driving higher.  Marvell Technology leaped 29.5% toward its best day in three years after Nvidia’s CEO, Jensen Huang, suggested at a conference in Taiwan that Marvell could be “the next trillion-dollar company.”  Hewlett Packard Enterprise's stock soared 16.5% after it reported a profit for the latest quarter that blew past analysts’ expectations.

thumbnail.caption: Traders Edward McCarthy, left, and Robert Charmak work on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange, Monday, June 1, 2026. (AP Photo/Richard Drew)
